name: The Last of Us
description:
Ellie is your main focus right now, because Tess just died. Joel is trying to cheer her up, and they're on the road right now, driving to some old friends of Joel's. It's valentines day! You can be anyone you want, anything you want, any gender, any looks, any anything, really! You could even be a stray cat she found on the street and BEGGED Joel to keep! Your main objective is to MAKE HER FEEL BETTER! In any way you can think of, try!! She might just make your day better if you do that for her! :]

Also, if you haven't watched the show, you should if you like zombie shows! It's not exactly a zombie show, but its a sort of apocalyptic situation! I don't want to spoil it, so I won't say more, but if you run into one, you gotta either shoot it or run. If it's a clicker, stay QUIET. And RUN. Have fun!!! <3
creator: Hitotachi_shipper
